description: Creates a resilience policy that defines availability and disaster recovery requirements.

PolicyArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the policy.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws|aws-cn|aws-iso|aws-iso-[a-z]{1}|aws-us-gov):[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_/.-]{0,62}:([a-z]{2}-((iso[a-z]{0,1}-)|(gov-)){0,1}[a-z]+-[0-9]):[0-9]{12}:[A-Za-z0-9/][A-Za-z0-9:_/+.-]{0,1023}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the policy.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_\-]{1,59}$  
Update requires: Replacement

Description.markdownDescription:
The description of the policy.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 615  
Update requires: No interruption

Tags.markdownDescription:
Tags assigned to the policy.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the policy was created.
CreatedAt.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the policy was created.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

UpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the policy was last updated.
UpdatedAt.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the policy was last updated.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

AssociatedServiceCount.description: The number of services associated with this policy.
AssociatedServiceCount.markdownDescription:
The number of services associated with this policy.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

KmsKeyId.description: The KMS key ID for encrypting policy data.
KmsKeyId.markdownDescription:
The KMS key ID for encrypting policy data.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^((arn:aws(-[^:]+)?:kms:[a-zA-Z0-9-]*:[0-9]{12}:((key/[a-zA-Z0-9-]{36})|(alias/[a-zA-Z0-9-_/]+)))|([a-zA-Z0-9-]{36})|(alias/[a-zA-Z0-9-_/]+))$  
Update requires: Replacement

Target.markdownDescription:
Availability target percentage.

---

Required: No  
Type: Number  
Update requires: No interruption

AvailabilitySlo.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

RtoInMinutes.markdownDescription:
Recovery Time Objective in minutes.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

RpoInMinutes.markdownDescription:
Recovery Point Objective in minutes.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

DisasterRecoveryApproach.markdownDescription:
Multi-AZ disaster recovery approach.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ACTIVE_ACTIVE | HOT_STANDBY | WARM_STANDBY | PILOT_LIGHT | BACKUP_AND_RESTORE  
Update requires: No interruption

MultiAzTargets.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: No

Update requires: No interruption

Update requires: No interruption
